mapper.select:
SELECT CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO /*kr.or.ddit.common.webSocket.chat.mapper.IChatMapper.selectMyRoomList*/ ,CR.CHAT_ROOM_NM ,CR.CHAT_ROOM_DESC ,CR.CHAT_JOIN_KEY ,CM.MSG_CN AS LAST_MSG ,CM.REG_DTTM AS LAST_TIME ,NVL(MC.MEMBER_CNT, 0) AS MEMBER_CNT
,NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE M WHERE M.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO AND NVL(M.SENDER_TY, 'USER') != 'SYSTEM' AND M.CHAT_MEMBER_ID != CRM.CHAT_MEMBER_ID AND M.CHAT_MSG_NO > NVL(( SELECT MR.LAST_READ_MSG_NO FROM CHAT_ROOM_READ MR WHERE MR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO AND MR.CHAT_MEMBER_ID = CRM.CHAT_MEMBER_ID ), 0) ), 0) AS UNREAD_CNT
FROM CHAT_ROOM CR INNER JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER CRM ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CRM.CHAT_ROOM_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, COUNT(*) AS MEMBER_CNT FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE LEFT_DTTM IS NULL GROUP BY CHAT_ROOM_NO ) MC ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = MC.CHAT_ROOM_NO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, MSG_CN, REG_DTTM FROM ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, MSG_CN, REG_DTTM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CHAT_ROOM_NO ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC ) AS RN FROM CHAT_MESSAGE ) WHERE RN = 1 ) CM ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CM.CHAT_ROOM_NO
WHERE CRM.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CR.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND CRM.LEFT_DTTM IS NULL AND CR.USE_YN = 'Y'
ORDER BY CM.REG_DTTM DESC

SELECT m.CHAT_MSG_NO , m.CHAT_ROOM_NO , m.MSG_TY_CD , m.MSG_CN , m.ATCH_FILE_ID , m.REG_DTTM , m.SENDER_TY , m.CHAT_MEMBER_ID
, rm.USER_NO AS SENDER_USER_NO , mem.USER_NM AS SENDER_USER_NM
FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m
LEFT JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER rm ON m.CHAT_MEMBER_ID = rm.CHAT_MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN MEMBER mem ON rm.USER_NO = mem.USER_NO
JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER rm2 ON rm2.CHAT_ROOM_NO = m.CHAT_ROOM_NO AND rm2.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND rm2.LEFT_DTTM IS NULL
WHERE m.CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo} AND m.REG_DTTM >= rm2.JOIN_DTTM
ORDER BY m.REG_DTTM ASC

SELECT /*kr.or.ddit.common.webSocket.chat.mapper.IChatMapper.selectMyRoom*/ cr.chat_room_no , cr.chat_room_nm , cr.chat_room_desc , cr.chat_room_ty_cd , cr.reg_dt , cr.use_yn , cr.rgtr_id , cr.chat_join_key , cr.apt_cmplex_no
, nvl(mc.member_cnt, 0) AS member_cnt
FROM chat_room cr
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT chat_room_no, count(*) AS member_cnt FROM chat_room_member WHERE left_dttm IS NULL GROUP BY chat_room_no ) mc ON cr.chat_room_no = mc.chat_room_no
WHERE cr.chat_room_no = #{chatRoomNo}

SELECT /*kr.or.ddit.common.webSocket.chat.mapper.IChatMapper.selectOpenRooms*/ CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO , CR.CHAT_ROOM_NM , cr.chat_room_desc , CR.CHAT_ROOM_TY_CD , CR.REG_DT , CR.RGTR_ID , CR.CHAT_JOIN_KEY , CR.APT_CMPLEX_NO
, NVL(MC.MEMBER_CNT, 0) AS MEMBER_CNT
FROM CHAT_ROOM CR
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, COUNT(*) AS MEMBER_CNT FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE LEFT_DTTM IS NULL GROUP BY CHAT_ROOM_NO ) MC ON CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO = MC.CHAT_ROOM_NO
WHERE CR.CHAT_ROOM_TY_CD = 'OPEN' AND CR.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND CR.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER CRM WHERE CRM.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CR.CHAT_ROOM_NO AND CRM.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CRM.LEFT_DTTM IS NULL )
ORDER BY CR.REG_DT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) /**/ FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo} AND LEFT_DTTM IS NULL
